goal: Wire 'gad tui' as a real gad subcommand. Today gad-tui is a separate package @magicborn/gad-tui in packages/gad-tui/ with its own bin; user must know the pnpm command. (1) Build @magicborn/gad-tui via 'pnpm --filter @magicborn/gad-tui build:bun' — produces packages/gad-tui/dist/gad-tui-windows.exe. (2) Teach scripts/build-bun-release.mjs to copy the gad-tui exe into dist/release/ next to gad.exe at build time. (3) gad self install copies BOTH gad.exe and gad-tui.exe to %LOCALAPPDATA%/Programs/gad/bin/. (4) Add bin/commands/tui.cjs that spawns the adjacent gad-tui exe (resolve via path.dirname(process.execPath)). (5) Works regardless of cwd. Verify: 'gad tui' from any dir launches the TUI.
